overview.short: The 'Kodandarama Temple' at Vontimitta is one of the most prominent Sri Rama temples in Andhra Pradesh and serves as the official venue for the State-sponsored Sri Sita Rama Kalyan
overview.description: The 'Kodandarama Temple' at Vontimitta is one of the most prominent Sri Rama temples in Andhra Pradesh and serves as the official venue for the State-sponsored Sri Sita Rama Kalyanam celebrations during Sri Rama Navami. The temple is regarded as one of the finest surviving examples of Vijayanagara architecture in the Rayalaseema region, featuring intricately carved mandapas, monumental gopurams, and elaborate stone sculptures is dated to the 16th century.The temple complex is among the largest and most historically significant Rama temples in Andhra Pradesh and attracts tens of thousands of pi

topPlaces.name: Vontimitta
topPlaces.description: Vontimitta (Telugu: ఒంటిమిట్ట) or Ekasilanagaram, is a village in Kadapa district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is located in Vontimitta mandal of the Kadapa revenue division.

topPlaces.name: Madhavaram, Kadapa
topPlaces.description: Madhavaram, is an uninhabited village in Vontimitta Taluk, Kadapa district in the state of Andhra Pradesh in India.

topPlaces.name: Mantapampalle
topPlaces.description: Mantapamapalle is a village in Vontimitta mandal of Kadapa district of Andhra Pradesh, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Sri Kodandrama Swamy Temple, Vontimitta?
faq.a: The best time to visit Sri Kodandrama Swamy Temple, Vontimitta is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Sri Kodandrama Swamy Temple, Vontimitta?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kadapa Airport (30 km) and the nearest railway station is Tirupati Railway Station (95 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Sri Kodandrama Swamy Temple, Vontimitta?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Sri Kodandrama Swamy Temple, Vontimitta at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Sri Kodandrama Swamy Temple, Vontimitta?
faq.a: Stays in Sri Kodandrama Swamy Temple, Vontimitta start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Sri Kodandrama Swamy Temple, Vontimitta?
faq.a: The top attractions are Vontimitta, Madhavaram, Kadapa, Mantapampalle.
